# Daily Report — 2026-04-19

## Task Completed
Improved error messages across all tools by introducing `_format_http_error()` in
`utils/helpers.py`. The function parses ServiceNow's JSON error body
(`error.message` + `error.detail`) from `raise_for_status()` failures and returns
a human-readable `HTTP <status>: <message> — <detail>` string instead of the raw
requests exception. Applied to all 19 tool files (140 `str(e)` call-sites replaced).
Also standardised logger calls in `syslog_tools.py` and `helpers.py` from `%s`
printf-style to f-strings to match the rest of the codebase.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 481 passed, 4 deselected
- Coverage: 89%
- All passing: yes

## Security
System-level packages (pip, setuptools, wheel, pyjwt) have known CVEs; no
vulnerabilities in project source code or direct dependencies.
